items.title: Official Export Tax Rebate Rate Library (2026A Version)
items.description: The latest State Taxation Administration library mapping 10-digit HS Codes to specific VAT rebate rates. Released March 2026.

items.title: How to Query a Specific Product's VAT Rebate Rate
items.description: Guide: (1) Verify your product's exact 10-digit HS Code from Customs. (2) Download the latest Rebate Rate Library from the STA website. (3) Use the offline export tax refund software or online portal to load the library. (4) Query your specific HS Code in the system to see the official rebate rate.

items.title: Cross-Border E-commerce Export Return Tax Exemption
items.description: Preferential tax policy allowing duty-free returns for unsold/returned e-commerce goods under customs codes 1210, 9610, 9710, 9810.

items.title: Comprehensive VAT & Consumption Tax Rules for Exports
items.description: Announcement defining exporter eligibility, VAT refund calculation methods, and compliance requirements.
